steps.t: Cave-claws infest the ruins of Ost Dúrgonn, north of the road and Barachen's camp. Heithur Ironfist believes that the cave-claws of Ost Dúrgonn might …
Heithur Ironfist is at Barachen's camp, east of the Last Bridge and south of the road, on a sloping hill in the shadow of tall cliffs. You have learne…
